# Veerapathra Lorry

> Veerapathra Lorry is a full truck load (FTL) transport company headquartered in Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu, India. We operate a fleet of 10 Ashok Leyland trucks (10-wheeler, 12-wheeler, and 16-wheeler) providing goods transport service between any pickup and delivery point across South India — covering Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Kerala, Andhra Pradesh, and Telangana.

## Contact

- Phone: +91 8344145145
- WhatsApp: +91 8344145145
- Location: Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu 613001, India
- Website: https://veerapathralorry.in
- Alternate domain: https://veerapathratransport.in

## Services

- [Full Truck Load Transport](https://veerapathralorry.in/): Dedicated truck for your cargo between any two points across South India
- [Lorry Booking](https://veerapathralorry.in/#contact): Book a lorry by calling 8344145145 or WhatsApp

## Fleet

- 10-Wheeler Ashok Leyland trucks (up to 15 tonnes)
- 12-Wheeler Ashok Leyland trucks (up to 21 tonnes)
- 16-Wheeler Ashok Leyland trucks (25+ tonnes)
- All trucks GPS-tracked via Ashok Leyland iALERT

## Pricing Models

- Flat Fee: Fixed price per trip
- Per Tonne: Rate based on cargo weight
- Per Bag: Rate per bag/unit

## Materials Transported

Agricultural goods (rice, paddy, sugarcane, cotton), construction materials (sand, cement, bricks, granite), industrial goods (steel, machinery), FMCG products, timber, and general cargo.

## Major Routes

- Chennai ↔ Bangalore (~350 km)
- Chennai ↔ Madurai (~460 km)
- Chennai ↔ Hyderabad (~630 km)
- Madurai ↔ Coimbatore (~210 km)
- Madurai ↔ Kochi (~250 km)
- Coimbatore ↔ Bangalore (~365 km)
- Coimbatore ↔ Kochi (~190 km)
- Salem ↔ Bangalore (~210 km)
- Thanjavur ↔ Chennai (~320 km)
- Thanjavur ↔ Bangalore (~350 km)
- Thanjavur ↔ Trichy (~55 km)
- Thanjavur ↔ Madurai (~160 km)
- Tirunelveli ↔ Kochi (~280 km)
- And all other routes across Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Kerala, Andhra Pradesh, and Telangana

## Service Area

Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Kerala, Andhra Pradesh, Telangana

## Availability

24 hours, 7 days a week, 365 days a year
